title: v37 — P1 render-correctness wave (review the SHIPPED items)

items.title: Sky reads as a smooth gradient
items.how: Look up / tilt the camera: the sky is a smooth warm gradient that matches the scene tone — not washed-out, not harshly banded.

items.title: Water doesn't punch holes
items.how: Find the pond/sea water: it renders ON TOP of the ground — no see-through gaps or holes in the floor/terrain where water overlaps.

items.title: No floor/terrain z-fight
items.how: Walk around the chapel floor edges: no flickering / shimmering seam where the interior floor meets the outdoor terrain.

items.title: Terrain colours read clean
items.how: Look at the ground: the grass/dirt vertex-colour blend looks clean, not muddied or darkened by a stray texture multiplying over it.

items.title: Altar glow fades smoothly
items.how: Pray at the altar: the warm glow eases out smoothly (asymptotic) rather than cutting off abruptly.

items.title: No load pop-in
items.how: Hard-reload the page: the loading screen stays until the scene is fully in — trees / NPCs / scenery do NOT pop in a moment after it disappears.

items.title: Names don't show through walls
items.how: Position a wall or large object between you and an NPC: its floating name should be HIDDEN by the wall, not visible through it.

items.title: Hover action label (C3)
items.how: Point at / hover a tree, rock, or NPC: a top-left action label appears (e.g. 'Chop down Tree', 'Talk-to ...').

items.title: Inventory ops + wield (C5)
items.how: Long-press / right-click a bag item: Use/Wield/Drop/Examine menu opens; Wield moves the item into the Equipment tab.

items.title: HUD orbs + run energy (C8)
items.how: HP / Prayer / Run / Spec orbs are visible and update; toggling run drains the run-energy orb as you move.

items.title: Tabs show real panels (C10)
items.how: Open Prayer, Magic, Quests, Settings, Emotes: each shows a real interactive panel, not a placeholder string.

items.title: No scene regression
items.how: Overall: the chapel scene still looks correct — walking, camera, NPCs, altar all behave as before, nothing newly broken by the render changes.

items.title: QA live sync
items.how: As you tap Pass/Fail/notes, the panel footer shows 'synced' — your results reach the dev (and the fleet dashboard) without copy/paste.
